description: Backend controllers and routes for Smart Rota Builder, Natural Language Search, Automated Risk Assessments, and Medication Interaction Checker (features 5-8)
steps: Create backend/src/controllers/smartRota.controller.ts with functions: generateRota (POST - AI generates optimal rota based on staff skills, preferences, resident acuity, budget, legal constraints; returns populated week grid), getRotaTemplate (GET - retrieve a generated rota), listRotaTemplates (GET - list saved templates), updateRotaShift (PATCH - manual edit/drag-drop adjustment), publishRota (POST - finalize and copy to main schedule), getStaffConstraints (GET - working time directive checks, contracted hours, preferences)

Create backend/src/controllers/nlSearch.controller.ts with functions: search (POST - takes natural language query, parses intent using keyword/pattern matching for residents, incidents, medications, falls, risk levels; executes appropriate SQL; returns results), getSearchHistory (GET - recent searches by user). Intent parsing should handle patterns like 'residents who had a fall', 'residents on [medication]', 'high fall risk', 'last month/week/year' time ranges, 'blood thinners' medication category mapping.

Create backend/src/controllers/riskAssessments.controller.ts with functions: calculateWaterlow (POST - auto-populate from existing data: age, weight, skin type, continence, mobility, appetite, medications, tissue malnutrition, neurological deficit), calculateMUST (POST - BMI score + unplanned weight loss + acute disease effect), calculateFallsRisk (POST - from incidents, mobility notes, medications, age), getResidentAssessments (GET - all assessments for a resident), getOverdueReviews (GET - assessments past next_review_date), getHomeRiskOverview (GET - summary with traffic lights across all residents)

Create backend/src/controllers/medInteractions.controller.ts with functions: checkInteractions (POST - given a resident_id, cross-reference all active medications against a built-in interaction database; flag dangerous combinations), getResidentInteractions (GET - all flagged interactions for a resident), acknowledgeInteraction (PATCH - mark as reviewed), getInteractionAlerts (GET - all unacknowledged alerts across home). Include a static interaction dataset covering common care home medications: warfarin+NSAIDs, ACEi+potassium-sparing diuretics, metformin+contrast, SSRIs+MAOIs, lithium+NSAIDs, digoxin+amiodarone, statins+macrolides, etc.
Register all new routes in backend/src/routes/index.ts under appropriate sections with role guards.
acceptance_criteria: All four controllers compile without TypeScript errors
Routes are registered with appropriate auth middleware
NL search handles at least 5 different query patterns (falls, medications, risk levels, time ranges, specific conditions)
Risk assessments implement correct Waterlow and MUST scoring algorithms
Medication interaction checker includes at least 15 common interaction pairs
Smart rota respects 48-hour working time directive limit
All controllers use tenant isolation via care_home_id
